content:
⸻

🧭 10. Implementation Meta-Prompt (next-phase)

Goal: Design the interface and visualization grammar of the RLOS as a living, evolving organism. Describe how users manipulate language through touch, gesture, and sound within the symbolic canvas, how each edit ripples through the rhetorical-linguistic lattice, and how the system self-represents its transformations aesthetically.

Include: architecture sketch, data schemas, aesthetic principles, interaction metaphors, ethical boundaries, and multilingual/iconographic handling.

⸻

⚙️ 11. Environment Variables

$PROJECT_NAME="RE:GE_OS_RHETORICAL_LINGUISTICS"
$MODE="RAW"
$VISUAL_LAYER="emoji|hiero|icon|typography"
$LANGS="auto,ar,zh,en,es,hi,ja,ru"
$OUT_DIR="$HOME/exports/rege_os_v2"
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 7 (chunk 7/18)
